title: Continuous Scanning Working Group
text:
Continuous Scanning Working Group

#wg_continuous_vuln_scans (only accessible from within the company)

Event Stream Working Group Agenda (only accessible from within the company)

~WorkingGroup::ContinuousScanning

The goal for this working group is to complete the work described in this Epic .

Our exit criteria maps to the proposal found in this Epic :

SBOM information is ingested and stored in the database

Advisory DB information is ingested and stored the database

Scans are triggered automatically when any changes are detected for either the SBOM information or the Advisory DB information

When the group was started, the target features were in categories spread across different stages and groups. With the creation of the Govern Stage the remaining two items are wholly within the responsibilities of the Composition Analysis group in the Secure stage, and as such they’re best completed as business-as-usual features in the owner group.

Roles and Responsibilities

Director of Product Management, Sec & Data Science

Backend Engineering Manager, Govern:Threat Insights, Govern:Security Policies

Senior Product Manager, Govern

Senior Backend Engineer, Secure:Composition Analysis

Senior Backend Engineer

Staff Backend Engineer, Govern:Threat Insights
